summary: God Mode Persona Switcher Feature Testing - All core features working correctly. Found one minor bug where Pro Lounge folder shows for non-Pro personas due to isAdmin check.

integration_issues.flow: Messages folder visibility during persona masking
integration_issues.issue: Pro Lounge folder is visible when masking as Surfer role (should be hidden for non-Pro personas)
integration_issues.root_cause: Line 58: `const isPro = isProRole(roleToCheck) || isAdmin;` shows Pro Lounge when isAdmin=true regardless of effective role

action_items: Fix MessagesPage.js line 58 to only check effectiveRole for Pro Lounge visibility, not isAdmin status
critical_code_review_comments: PersonaContext.js: localStorage persistence working correctly - activePersona and isGodMode are saved/restored
Sidebar.js: 'Viewing as' badge shows effective role with proper emoji (🏄 for Surfer, 🔴 for God Mode)
Sidebar.js: '(God Mode Active)' indicator visible when masking a persona
AdminDashboard.js: Persona Switcher dropdown properly shows all 13 personas
Profile.js: ProfileRoleBadge reflects effective persona role
Feed.js: isPhotographer check uses effectiveRole for role-based features
MessagesPage.js line 58 BUG: Pro Lounge visible for isAdmin even when effectiveRole is non-Pro
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin user account
context_for_next_testing_agent: God Mode Persona Switcher feature is fully functional. Admin can switch personas, sidebar shows 'Viewing as' with appropriate emoji, persona persists across pages, and profile badge reflects effective role. One minor bug: Pro Lounge shows in Messages for Surfer persona due to isAdmin check in getFolders function.

login_admin_user.description: Login with kelly@surf.com / test-shaka successful, redirected to /feed

navigate_to_admin.description: God Mode nav link in sidebar navigates to /admin, Admin Dashboard loads

persona_switcher_visible.description: Persona Switcher dropdown found on Admin Dashboard, shows all 13 personas

switch_to_surfer.description: Clicking Surfer option changes active persona

sidebar_viewing_as_badge.description: Sidebar shows 'Viewing as' with 🏄 Surfer emoji and '(God Mode Active)' text

persona_persists_on_feed.description: Navigating to /feed preserves Surfer persona in sidebar

profile_role_badge.description: Profile shows '🏄 Surfer' role badge when masking as Surfer

messages_folder_visibility.description: Pro Lounge folder visible for Surfer persona (should be hidden)
messages_folder_visibility.root_cause: MessagesPage.js line 58: isAdmin check overrides effectiveRole check

top_banner_visible.description: Cyan banner 'VIEWING AS: 🏄 SURFER' with 'X EXIT' button visible across pages

switch_back_to_god_mode.description: Clicking 'God Mode (Default)' reverts persona, sidebar shows '⭐ Pro Surfer' (user's actual role)

ui_observations.top_banner: Cyan banner at top shows 'VIEWING AS: [emoji] [ROLE]' with 'X EXIT' button when persona is masked
ui_observations.sidebar: Shows 'Viewing as' section with emoji icon, role label, and '(God Mode Active)' indicator
ui_observations.persona_dropdown: Opens with all 13 personas organized in scrollable list with icons and descriptions
ui_observations.current_persona_highlight: Selected persona has cyan background and checkmark icon
